title: Dashboard views on item views should allow dashboard widgets from the app marketplace
excerpt:
Some native item views are essentially a dashboard containing preconfigured widgets. 
  
If a dashboard can be added as an item view, then widgets from apps should be available to display on the dashboard, not just nativ…

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Some native item views are essentially a dashboard containing preconfigured widgets.

Screenshot 2024-06-17 at 23.15.242462×1330 469 KB

If a dashboard can be added as an item view, then widgets from apps should be available to display on the dashboard, not just native MDC widgets.
